lines.raw: A walk through the woods | 林中散步

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: What was so funny about the words on the sign?
lines.chinese: 牌子上的字有什么好笑的？
lines.raw: What was so funny about the words on the sign? | 牌子上的字有什么好笑的？

lines.english: I live in a very old town which is surrounded by beautiful woods.
lines.chinese: 我住在一个非常古老的小镇，它被美丽的树林环绕着。
lines.raw: I live in a very old town which is surrounded by beautiful woods. | 我住在一个非常古老的小镇，它被美丽的树林环绕着。

lines.english: It is a famous beauty spot.
lines.chinese: 这是一个著名的风景区。
lines.raw: It is a famous beauty spot. | 这是一个著名的风景区。

lines.english: On Sundays, hundreds of people come from the city to see our town and to walk through the woods.
lines.chinese: 每到星期天，成百上千的人从城里赶来参观我们的小镇，并在树林中散步。
lines.raw: On Sundays, hundreds of people come from the city to see our town and to walk through the woods. | 每到星期天，成百上千的人从城里赶来参观我们的小镇，并在树林中散步。

lines.english: Visitors have been asked to keep the woods clean and tidy.
lines.chinese: 游客们被要求保持树林的清洁整齐。
lines.raw: Visitors have been asked to keep the woods clean and tidy. | 游客们被要求保持树林的清洁整齐。

lines.english: Litter baskets have been placed under the trees, but people still throw their rubbish everywhere.
lines.chinese: 树下放置了垃圾筐，但人们仍然随处乱扔垃圾。
lines.raw: Litter baskets have been placed under the trees, but people still throw their rubbish everywhere. | 树下放置了垃圾筐，但人们仍然随处乱扔垃圾。

lines.english: Last Wednesday, I went for a walk in the woods.
lines.chinese: 上个星期三，我到树林里散步。
lines.raw: Last Wednesday, I went for a walk in the woods. | 上个星期三，我到树林里散步。

lines.english: What I saw made me very sad.
lines.chinese: 我看到的一切让我很难过。
lines.raw: What I saw made me very sad. | 我看到的一切让我很难过。

lines.english: I counted seven old cars and three old refrigerators.
lines.chinese: 我数出了七辆旧汽车和三台旧冰箱。
lines.raw: I counted seven old cars and three old refrigerators. | 我数出了七辆旧汽车和三台旧冰箱。

lines.english: The little baskets were empty and the ground was covered with pieces of paper,
lines.chinese: 那些垃圾筐都是空的，地上却铺满了碎纸片，
lines.raw: The little baskets were empty and the ground was covered with pieces of paper, | 那些垃圾筐都是空的，地上却铺满了碎纸片，

lines.english: cigarette ends, old tyres, empty bottles and rusty tins.
lines.chinese: 烟头、旧轮胎、空瓶子和生锈的罐头盒。
lines.raw: cigarette ends, old tyres, empty bottles and rusty tins. | 烟头、旧轮胎、空瓶子和生锈的罐头盒。

lines.english: Among the rubbish, I found a sign which said, 'Anyone who leaves litter in these woods will be prosecuted!'
lines.chinese: 在这些垃圾中，我发现了一个牌子，上面写着：“凡在此树林中乱扔垃圾者，将受到起诉！”
lines.raw: Among the rubbish, I found a sign which said, 'Anyone who leaves litter in these woods will be prosecuted!' | 在这些垃圾中，我发现了一个牌子，上面写着：“凡在此树林中乱扔垃圾者，将受到起诉！”
